title: Add LangGraph to Orchestration Frameworks
body:
This PR adds a new entry.

```markdown
- **[LangGraph](https://github.com/langchain-ai/langgraph)** — Typed graph orchestration with checkpointing. [official](https://langchain-ai.github.io/langgraph/). Production use documented in [field report](https://blog.langchain.dev/langgraph-v1/). Apache-2.0. Unique: typed DAG + interrupts. _Last reviewed: April 2026._
```
